prompt: Create a photorealistic square close-up portrait of two friendly dogs sitting cheek-to-cheek in a dark park at night: on the left, a black Labrador retriever with glossy black fur, warm brown eyes, floppy ears, an open smiling mouth with pink tongue visible, and a bright red collar with a small metal ring; on the right, a German shepherd with tan-and-black fur, upright pointed ears, brown eyes, a slightly tilted head, and an open happy mouth with tongue out. Both dogs face the camera directly, their muzzles touching affectionately, filling most of the frame from chest to ears. Use realistic flash photography with crisp fur detail, wet nose highlights, catchlights in the eyes, and shallow depth of field. The background should be an out-of-focus nighttime urban park with dark grass and warm golden circular bokeh lights from distant streetlamps and buildings. Composition is intimate, centered, symmetrical but natural, with the Labrador occupying the left half and the German shepherd the right half. No text, no humans, no extra animals, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic square close-up portrait of two friendly dogs sitting cheek-to-cheek in a dark park at night: on the left, a black Labrador retriever with glossy black fur, warm brown eyes, floppy ears, an open smiling mouth with pink tongue visible, and a bright red collar with a small metal ring; on the right, a German shepherd with tan-and-black fur, upright pointed ears, brown eyes, a slightly tilted head, and an open happy mouth with tongue out. Both dogs face the camera directly, their muzzles touching affectionately, filling most of the frame from chest to ears. Use realistic flash photography with crisp fur detail, wet nose highlights, catchlights in the eyes, and shallow depth of field. The background should be an out-of-focus nighttime urban park with dark grass and warm golden circular bokeh lights from distant streetlamps and buildings. Composition is intimate, centered, symmetrical but natural, with the Labrador occupying the left half and the German shepherd the right half. No text, no humans, no extra animals, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张写实的方形特写肖像，展示两只友好的狗狗在夜晚昏暗的公园里脸贴脸坐着：左侧是一只 黑色拉布拉多寻回犬，有着光亮的黑色皮毛、温暖的棕色眼睛、下垂的耳朵、张开的嘴巴露出粉红色的舌头，以及一条明亮的 红色 项圈，上面挂着一个小金属环；右侧是一只 德国牧羊犬，有着棕黑相间的皮毛、竖立的尖耳朵、棕色的眼睛、微微倾斜的头部，以及张开的快乐嘴巴，舌头伸出。两只狗都直视镜头，口鼻部亲昵地触碰在一起，占据了从胸部到耳朵的大部分画面。使用写实的闪光灯摄影技术，呈现清晰的皮毛细节、湿润的鼻尖高光、眼睛里的眼神光，以及浅景深效果。背景应为失焦的夜间城市公园，有深色的草地和来自远处路灯与建筑的温暖金色圆形光斑。构图亲密、居中、对称且自然，拉布拉多犬占据左半部分，德国牧羊犬占据右半部分。无文字，无人类，无其他动物，无水印。
